// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalajs.js
import scala.scalajs.js.annotation.*
import scala.scalajs.js.typedarray.*
import scala.scalajs.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class HandleBindingsImpl extends HandleBindings:
    import HandleBindingsImpl.*

    def open(path: String)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Handle[kyo.example.golden.MyHandle] =
        val retValRaw = facade.open(path)
        if js.isUndefined(retValRaw) || retValRaw == null then throw new kyo.ffi.FfiNullPointer("kyo.example.HandleBindings.open returned null") else Ffi.Handle.wrap(retValRaw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef])

    def close(h: Ffi.Handle[kyo.example.golden.MyHandle])(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Unit =
        val hRaw = Ffi.Handle.unwrap(h).asInstanceOf[js.Any]
        val _ = facade.close(hRaw)
        ()
end HandleBindingsImpl

object HandleBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.HandleBindings")
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_handle"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("open", "open", "void*", Seq[js.Any]("string".asInstanceOf[js.Any])),
            KoffiFn("close", "close", "void", Seq[js.Any]("void*".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
        )
    )
end HandleBindingsImpl
